steps.title: Use the visibility clue
steps.content: The sentence says Spanish influence is seen throughout California and that tourists can easily recognize it in Los Angeles Union Station. The blank needs a word meaning that the influence is plainly noticeable.

steps.title: Reject weaker meanings
steps.content: B means subtle, which conflicts with easy recognition. C means contested, but no dispute is mentioned. D means supported by evidence, which does not describe an architectural influence being visible throughout the state. The answer is A.
